sources_inspected.note: SOURCE_CONFIG covers BIG_LOTTO, POWER_LOTTO, DAILY_539 only. No 3_STAR API endpoint defined. Cannot fetch 3_STAR draws without adding new endpoint + authorization.
Ingest log has 0 entries for lottery_type=3_STAR. 3_STAR has never been ingested via the fetcher pipeline.
3_STAR max_draw=115000024 (4115 draws). No draw > 115000024 present. This is the current DB baseline — not a source for new draws.
All 16 backup DBs inspected. All have 3_STAR max=115000024, count=4115. No backup contains a draw > 115000024.
Contains analysis scripts (analyze_real_data.py, system_core.py, etc.) and research reports. No raw draw CSV/JSON source data. Scripts operate on DB data, not standalone source.
special3_baseline_dryrun.py, special3_oos_permutation_review.py, special3_prospective_dryrun_plan.py, special3_prospective_evaluation.py. All read from DB. None contain raw draw source data.
Contains DAILY_539 draw IDs up to 115000030+. Not 3_STAR draws. Lottery type mismatch.
CSV files: 大樂透加開獎項_2025.csv (BIG_LOTTO supplement draws), lotto649_realistic_data.csv, sample-data.csv, converted_2024.csv. None contain 3_STAR draw records.
Strategy rejection records. Draw references (115000027 etc.) are DAILY_539/other type context. lottery_type fields absent or unknown. Not a 3_STAR draw source.
P97/P98/P99/P100/P101 phase artifacts. Research and governance outputs only. Not raw draw source data.

hold_reason: No local source contains a new 3_STAR draw > 115000024. The official fetcher (taiwan_lottery_fetcher.py) has no 3_STAR API endpoint. All 16 backup DBs have max=115000024. Ingest log shows 0 historical 3_STAR ingestion events. No CSV/XLSX raw draw files found. User must provide an authorized external source or authorize adding a 3_STAR API endpoint to the fetcher.
recommended_next_action: User must provide source or authorize official/source ingestion audit. Options: (A) Provide a raw 3_STAR draw CSV/JSON file with draws > 115000024 for controlled ingestion planning (P103). (B) Authorize adding a 3_STAR API endpoint to lottery_api/fetcher/taiwan_lottery_fetcher.py and an ingestion plan (P103). Without explicit source authorization, evaluation pipeline remains blocked.
p103_gate_reason: P103 requires either: (A) user-provided raw source file, or (B) explicit authorization to add 3_STAR API endpoint. Neither is currently available.
